t_ch: 那些突出地面的机关，是要我们想办法激活它们？
t_en: And those mechanisms protruding from the ground... Should we attempt to activate them?

t_ch: 预言算碑……
t_en: A Prophecy Tablet...

t_ch: 利用场上的工具解开谜题吧，两位阁下。
t_en: Let's make use of the tools here to solve the puzzle.

t_ch: 是出口吗？好像被锁上了。
t_en: Is this the exit? Oh, it's locked.

t_ch: 先集中精力点燃火盆吧。
t_en: Let's focus on igniting the braziers first.

t_ch: 路障…得想办法清理掉。
t_en: Barricades... We must find a way to remove them.

t_ch: 是专为扎格列斯之手设计的试炼吗？靠近些看看吧。
t_en: Could it be a challenge that requires us to use the Hand of Zagreus? Let's get closer and find out.

t_ch: 如此一来，前方的道路就畅通了。
t_en: The way ahead is now clear.

t_ch: 格奈乌斯阁下，继续前进之前…有一件事，我们必须同你说明。
t_en: Lord Gnaeus, before we move on... there is something we must explain to you.

t_ch: …我明白。你们并非为这愚蠢的竞赛而来。
t_en: ...Hm. You're not here for this foolish competition.

t_ch: 你是怎么……
t_en: How did you...?

t_ch: 这一路你都在压制体内的暗潮…你欺骗不了我。
t_en: You've been fighting to suppress your true thoughts within you all this while... You cannot deceive me.

t_ch: 你们对那庸王编造出来的虚伪荣光毫无兴趣。我无意过问你们的目的，只要不妨碍到我……
t_en: I know you have no care for that fatuous king's contrived glory. You can keep your motive to yourselves, so long as you stay out of my way...

t_ch: 那你的目的是什么？
t_en: So, what is your motive?

t_ch: 我已经说过一遍——粉碎盘踞在悬锋城深处的愚蠢。
t_en: I've said it before: To obliterate the deeply entrenched roots of foolishness within Castrum Kremnos.

t_ch: 真正的挑战来了…艰难的部分才刚开始。
t_en: Now the true challenge begins... This is where it gets difficult.

t_ch: 无谓的磨损，他们本该倒在战场上。若执意阻拦…就带他们去见{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}吧。
t_en: Meaningless forestalling. They are meant to taste defeat on the battlefield. Deter us further... and I shall send them to {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}.

t_ch: …等等。
t_en: ...Wait.

t_ch: 腰闪了？
t_en: Got a crick in your back?

t_ch: 等不了，战斗的欲望正在高涨！
t_en: No can do, I'm already itching to fight!

t_ch: 请冷静些，{NICKNAME}阁下。
t_en: Please keep it together, {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 嘘…听。
t_en: Hush... Listen.

t_ch: 嘿，嘿嘿……
t_en: Heh heheh...

t_ch: 这下可有的赚了……
t_en: Looks like I've hit the jackpot this time...

t_ch: 我也听到了，那是……
t_en: I hear it now. That's...

t_ch: 装作什么都没听到，一切如常。
t_en: Pretend you did not hear anything. Act oblivious.

t_ch: 会找到机会让他现身的。
t_en: We'll find a way to make him come out of hiding.

t_ch: 安静……
t_en: Keep quiet...

t_ch: 哈…跑得可真快，一袋都快装不下了……
t_en: *pant* They sure are quick on their feet. One bag won't be enough to hold everything...

t_ch: 这一趟下来，接下来几天应该都不用捡剩饭填肚皮了吧？嘿嘿…真希望这祭典能多持续一阵啊。
t_en: After this haul, I shouldn't have to scrounge for leftovers for the next few days. If only this festival could go on longer...

t_ch: …现在。
t_en: ...Now.
Huh!?

t_ch: 啊！
t_en: Gah!

t_ch: 啊？
t_en: Huh?

t_ch: 是你！
t_en: It's you!

t_ch: …怪不得你出售的武器上有血腥味。
t_en: ...That's why all of your weapons reek of blood.

t_ch: 呃，呃呃，那个…三位勇士，我可以解释！你们看啊，我这……
t_en: Uh... ahem, well... I can explain myself! You see, I—

t_ch: 如狗鼠般卑劣的清道夫…让我送你去见{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}吧，窃贼。
t_en: Looting the arena like a despicable lowlife... Prepare to meet {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}, thief.

t_ch: 不！！住手——
t_en: No! Stop!

t_ch: 格奈乌斯阁下，等等！
t_en: Don't do it, Lord Gnaeus!

t_ch: 这样做不对。请…放他走吧。
t_en: This isn't right. Please... let him go.

t_ch: 回头看看那些碎裂的尸骸，女孩——你能毫不犹豫地杀死那些战士，却要怜悯这只肮脏的狗鼠？
t_en: Turn around, girl. Look at the corpses of those we crushed. You can cut down warriors without a second thought, yet you show compassion to this scum?

t_ch: 给我一个解释…证明你并非同那群乌合之众一样愚蠢。
t_en: Give me a reason... show me you're not as dumb as those ignorant fools.

t_ch: 因为…他还对死亡心存畏惧。尽管卑劣、肮脏，但他罪不至死，不应沦为{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}「灰黯之手」{RUBY_E#}的祭品。
t_en: Because... he still knows how to fear death. Despicable or scum he may be, but he doesn't deserve to die here, nor become a sacrifice to the {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Hand of Shadow{RUBY_E#}.

t_ch: 它是世间最可怕的幽暗，如果任其生长…一切光亮将被吞噬。
t_en: It is the darkest force in this world, and if left unchecked... all light will be consumed.

t_ch: 回答你的提问，驱使我挥剑的从来不是对杀戮的热忱，而是对死亡的恐惧。
t_en: To answer your question, it is never the desire to kill that drives me to wield a sword, but rather, the fear of death.

t_ch: …滚吧，狗鼠。你今天捡回了一条命。
t_en: ...Get lost, scum. Consider yourself lucky today.

t_ch: 谢、谢谢、谢谢你们！我…我不会再出现在这座城邦周边了，我保证！
t_en: Th—Thank you! Y—You won't see me around this city again, I promise!

t_ch: 谢谢你手下留情，格奈乌斯阁下。
t_en: Your mercy is appreciated, Lord Gnaeus.

t_ch: 别误会。这不过是对你胆识的嘉奖，不代表我赞同你的理论。
t_en: Make no mistake. This is simply a commendation for your courage, not a sign that I agree with your ideas.

t_ch: 依照你的说法，在刚才的瞬间…你一定是克服了莫大的恐惧，才胆敢拦在我的剑前。
t_en: If I understand you correctly, you must have overcome tremendous fear to dare to stand in the way of my sword.

t_ch: 还有路要赶…走吧。
t_en: This trial isn't over... We should keep going.

t_ch: 又是相同的机关…需要点燃两个火盆才能打开通路。
t_en: It's the same mechanism... We need to ignite the two braziers to unlock the way forward.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}阁下，我们一起通过考验吧。
t_en: Let's clear this trial together, {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 上等的石料…可惜出现在了不该出现的地方。
t_en: An exquisite stone... It's a shame it appeared somewhere it doesn't belong.

t_ch: 也许用「宝珠」可以让它暂时消失？
t_en: We may be able to temporarily remove it with the orb?

t_ch: 大门不能在这个时空下打开…去典籍那里回收「奇迹」吧？
t_en: The gate won't budge in this time dimension... How about recovering the "miracle" from the tome?

t_ch: 勇者…勇者！靠近些…让我看清你啊……
t_en: Brave one... O Brave one! Come closer... Let me get a good look at you...

t_ch: 你在召唤我吗，狮子？
t_en: Are you calling out to me, lion?

t_ch: 没错…没错。你身上的光环啊…我许久未见如此滚烫的灵魂啊。
t_en: That's right... I am. You have an unusual aura about you... I have not seen such a blazing soul in a very long time.

t_ch: 悬锋城最灼热的流星，已经飞离了我们啊…剩下的只是一簇随时可能熄灭的残烛。
t_en: The blazing star of Castrum Kremnos has drifted far from us... all that remains is a dim candle, on the verge of being extinguished.

t_ch: 最灼热的流星…
t_en: Blazing star...

t_ch: …是在说万敌吗？
t_en: ...Is that Mydei?

t_ch: 我想…是的。
t_en: I think... you're right.

t_ch: 年迈又昏聩的王，在密谋着不可言说的计划…他们想要亵渎{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的神性、它的灵魂、还有它留给悬锋城的遗产啊。
t_en: The aging and feeble king is plotting something unspeakable... One that seeks to defile {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s divinity, their soul, and the legacy they left to Kremnos.

t_ch: 我们需要拯救…需要一位勇士带给我们希望啊。
t_en: We need salvation... we need a champion to reignite our hope.

t_ch: …我不是来拯救谁的，老狮子。我来到这里只是为了响应召唤…粉碎愚蠢和贪婪。
t_en: ...I did not come to save anybody, old lion. I am here to answer a call... to crush greed and foolishness once and for all.

t_ch: 或许…那正是我们急需的东西啊。
t_en: Perhaps... that's what we desperately need.

t_ch: 前进吧，勇士…去回应召唤吧。我已年迈…疲倦…但我会目送你远离这里，为你念诵战无不胜的祷言啊……
t_en: Forge on then, warrior... heed the call. I am elderly... and weary... but I shall watch you depart and pray for victory in every battle encounter...

t_ch: 如此惨烈…这祭典究竟是为了满足谁的欲望？
t_en: Such carnage... whose desires does this festival truly serve?

t_ch: 失去目标的野兽，只是在凭本能追踪血腥罢了。
t_en: A beast that has lost sight of its target and is now guided only by its innate bloodlust.

t_ch: 格奈乌斯阁下，我们已经深入悬锋城的心脏…该让你知悉我们的目的了。
t_en: Lord Gnaeus, now that we're at the very heart of Castrum Kremnos... it's time to let you in on our goal here.

t_ch: 我们不奢望合作，但求不生冲突。
t_en: While we do not expect you to work with us, we do not wish for conflict either.

t_ch: …说吧。
t_en: ...Speak.

t_ch: 我们为找到毁灭{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的方法而来。我们收到了…一则情报，失去理智的纷争泰坦正在为自己打造不朽的躯体。
t_en: We came here to find a way to destroy {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}. We received... intel that the Titan of Strife had lost their reason and is now trying to create an immortal vessel for themself.

t_ch: 如果不加以阻止，它会对后世的翁法罗斯形成巨大的威胁。
t_en: If we do not stop them now, they will pose a grave danger to the future generations of Amphoreus.

t_ch: 哼，威胁……
t_en: Hmph, grave danger, you say...

t_ch: 我们的目标并不冲突，女孩。找到泰坦，我们便能各取所需。
t_en: Our goals are not in conflict, girl. Find the Titan and we can both get what we came for.

t_ch: 祭典怎么办？
t_en: What about the festival?

t_ch: 我奉劝你，忘记它吧。
t_en: Better off forgotten.

t_ch: 难道要和它战斗…
t_en: Will we have to battle them...?

t_ch: 我嗅到了恐惧…你胆怯了？
t_en: I smell fear... You're scared?

t_ch: 牺牲者的灵魂还在这大厅里彷徨…无意义的牺牲令他们蒙受冤屈，悲嚎不绝于耳。
t_en: The souls of the sacrificed are still wandering this hall... I hear their endless bemoaning, their senseless deaths have left them wronged, their mournful wails echo endlessly.

t_ch: 也许我能从他们那里听到些什么……
t_en: Perhaps I can learn something from their cries...

t_ch: 现身吧，战士之魂…我知道你尚未安歇。
t_en: Reveal yourself, O warrior spirit... I know that you have yet to rest.

t_ch: 引导我们吧，让我们看见你曾看见的，听到你曾听到的……
t_en: I ask for you to guide us. Let us see what you once gazed upon, let us hear what your ears once heard...

t_ch: 未能安眠者…请告诉我们，你听到了什么？
t_en: O, ye who cannot rest in peace... Tell us, what have you heard?

t_ch: 「真的不用处理掉吗？这里的腐臭…已经令人难以忍受了。」
t_en: "Do we really just leave them like that? The putrid stench of decay here is almost too much to bear."

t_ch: 「不，你难道没听清吗？这是仪式的一部分，是为泰坦奉上的献祭。」
t_en: "Yes. Didn't you hear? This is part of the ritual. We need to offer up sacrifices to the Titan."

t_ch: 「继续迎接挑战者，让他们一直战斗下去…只有让{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}沉醉在战争的气息中，才能压制它的疯狂。」
t_en: "Keep the challengers coming and have them fight till the end... only by letting {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} revel in the chaos of war can we control their descent into madness."

t_ch: 他们在营造一场虚假的战争，企图用这种方式令泰坦镇静。{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}…它的确已经丧失了意志。
t_en: Hmph, fabricating a spurious war in an attempt to calm the Titan. {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}... has indeed lost their will.

t_ch: 看来这种野蛮的方式奏效了。
t_en: This barbaric method of theirs clearly proved to be effective.

t_ch: 灵魂…它还可以为我们展示更多。
t_en: The soul... can reveal even more to us.

t_ch: 尚未安眠的亡魂，咳…你听到了什么？
t_en: O, restless soul... *cough* Tell us, what have you heard?

t_ch: 「祭典还要持续多久？欧利庞王…他还在拖延什么？」
t_en: "How much longer is this festival going to last? What is King Eurypon waiting for?"

t_ch: 「耐心些，计划尚未完成…<color=#dbc291ff>封存泰坦的灵魂并非易事</color>。祭司们已经在加班加点……」
t_en: "Be patient, for our plan is still underway... <color=#dbc291ff>Sealing a Titan's soul is no easy endeavor</color>. The priests are already working as fast as they can..."

t_ch: 「从其它城邦虏来的祭司，谁能保证他们的忠诚？我看还是要杀鸡儆猴，哼……」
t_en: "Priests captured from other city-states — who can guarantee their loyalty? Hmph, I say we punish one of them so they know to behave..."

t_ch: 「封存神明的灵魂……」
t_en: Sealing a Titan's soul...

t_ch: 莫非是利波的诗歌中提到的「剑皿」？出自哈托努斯之手的……
t_en: Could it be the Sword Vessel in Lipos' ballad? The one that Chartonus crafted himself...

t_ch: 「愚蠢」…现在你们或许能理解这二字的意义。
t_en: Foolishness... Perhaps now you begin to understand the weight of that term.

t_ch: 他们为什么要这么做？
t_en: Why are they doing this?

t_ch: 懦弱——他们惧怕失去信仰和指引。
t_en: Out of cowardice. They are afraid of losing their faith and guidance.

t_ch: {RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}在与无形之物战斗，无暇顾及凡人的愚蠢。
t_en: {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} fights against the unseen, they have no time for the folly of mortals.

t_ch: 尼卡多利就这么任他们摆布？
t_en: So Nikador is at their mercy?

t_ch: 它此刻在与无形之物战斗，无暇顾及凡人的愚蠢。
t_en: They are fighting against the unseen, they have no time for the folly of mortals.

t_ch: 懦弱之人…他们惧怕失去信仰和指引。
t_en: Cowards... They are afraid of losing their faith and guidance.

t_ch: 格奈乌斯阁下…你对那位泰坦似乎十分了解。
t_en: Lord Gnaeus, you seem to know a lot about that Titan.

t_ch: 或许在我耳边低语的，正是{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}本尊。
t_en: The whispers I'm hearing may very well be from {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} themself.

t_ch: 彼岸在呼唤…继续指引我们吧，亡魂。
t_en: They're beckoning to us from the other side... Continue to guide us through, O wandering soul.

t_ch: 亡魂…告诉我们……
t_en: Lost souls... Tell us...

t_ch: 咳…咳，咳……
t_en: *cough* *cough* *cough*

t_ch: 这一个有什么不同吗？
t_en: Is this one taking more out of you?

t_ch: 你坚持得住吗，遐蝶？
t_en: Do you need a break, Castorice?

t_ch: 我…我很好，{NICKNAME}阁下。不必担心。
t_en: I... I'm fine, {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}. There's no need to worry.

t_ch: 亡魂…告诉我，你听到了什么？
t_en: Lost souls... Tell us, what have you heard?

t_ch: 「听说了吗？欧利庞王的谋臣们正在拟定计划，他们好像打算对奥赫玛发动总攻。」
t_en: "Have you heard? King Eurypon's advisors are coming up with a plan to launch an all-out attack on Okhema."

t_ch: 「以现在的兵力？这是彻头彻尾的疯狂……」
t_en: "With just the handful of soldiers we have? They're absolutely out of their minds..."

t_ch: 「这是长远的战略。眼下的第一要务还是完成对神王的…『工程』。」
t_en: "That's the long-term plan. Our priority for now is still to complete the god-king's... 'project'."

t_ch: 袭击奥赫玛的计划，在如此久远的年代就已有雏形了吗？
t_en: So their plan to attack Okhema was conceived that long ago?

t_ch: 原来那不是尼卡多利的设计…
t_en: Looks like it wasn't Nikador's idea...

t_ch: 始作俑者恐怕早就化成灰了。
t_en: Whoever hatched that plan must've long since turned to ash.

t_ch: 果真如此。
t_en: I knew it.

t_ch: …格奈乌斯阁下？
t_en: ...Lord Gnaeus?

t_ch: 我早已发现，你们与此地…不，是与这个年代格格不入。
t_en: I've long suspected that you two are not from here... No, not just that. You're not from this era.

t_ch: 是{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}吗？不…哪怕是它，也没有如此强大的神力。
t_en: Is it {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}? No... they would not be capable of such power.

t_ch: 这下露馅了…
t_en: Yikes, our cover's blown...!

t_ch: 这下只能灭口了！
t_en: Looks like we'll have to silence him for good!

t_ch: 冷静，{NICKNAME}阁下…我认为他没有恶意。
t_en: Calm yourself, {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}... I believe he has no ill intent toward us.

t_ch: 你没猜错…咳…格奈乌斯阁下——我们的确不属于这个时代。
t_en: Your guess is correct, Lord Gnaeus... *cough* We are not from this era.

t_ch: 遥远未来的某日…陷入疯狂的{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}会把我们的伙伴和家园逼上绝路。我们回到这里…就是为了寻找阻止末日降临的方法。
t_en: Some day in the distant future... a mad {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} will drive our companions and our homeland to the brink of destruction. The reason we came back here... is to find a way to prevent Amphoreus from falling to its doom.

t_ch: …它的疯狂会延续至千百年后？人的愚蠢所能造成的破坏难以丈量。到头来，原来我们的目标完全一致。
t_en: ...Their madness will last for thousands of years? The destruction created by human folly is more than anyone could imagine. It so happens that we have the same goal.

t_ch: 咳、咳…灵魂…还未散去。继续前进吧……
t_en: *cough* *cough* The souls... are still lingering here. Let us keep going...

t_ch: 尚未安眠的亡魂……
t_en: O, restless soul...

t_ch: 遐蝶…
t_en: Castorice...

t_ch: 你不必这么坚持……
t_en: Why don't you take a break...?

t_ch: 我没事…{NICKNAME}阁下。
t_en: I'm fine... {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 亡魂…告诉我，你听到了什么？
t_en: Lost souls... Tell us, what have you heard?

t_ch: 「勇气。荣耀。坚韧。牺牲。将它的神性分成五份…但仍有一瓣缺失。」
t_en: "Courage, Honor, Tenacity, and Sacrifice. Their divinity was split into five parts... but we're missing one fragment."

t_ch: 「神王啊…你将自己的<color=#dbc291ff>理智</color>丢弃到了何处？」
t_en: "Oh god-king... Where did you lose your <color=#dbc291ff>reason</color>?"

t_ch: 「我们会继续寻找。我们一定会找到……」
t_en: "We will keep searching for it. We must find it..."

t_ch: …咳、咳咳、咳！
t_en: *cough* *cough* *cough*

t_ch: 咳…为被夹在生死两界之间的灵魂引渡，居然如此痛苦……
t_en: *cough*... I never knew ferrying souls stuck in limbo could bring this much pain...

t_ch: 要是这世上没有死亡就好了。那样，他们就不必在这里彷徨…我也不必受此折磨。
t_en: If only death didn't exist in this world. That way, they wouldn't have to linger here... and I wouldn't have to suffer.

t_ch: …不必再聆听亡者之声了，现在的信息已经足够。悬锋城人对{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的灵魂动了手脚，我们只需找到他们渎神的现场。
t_en: ...You don't have to listen to these spirits any longer. We've learned enough from them now. The people of Kremnos have tampered with {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s soul in some way. What we need to do is find the place of their blasphemous act.

t_ch: 别倒下——我们还没到终点。
t_en: Stay strong. We have not reached the end yet.

t_ch: …马上就好。给我几秒钟的时间…让我将这个陌生的灵魂送到温柔乡吧。
t_en: ...I'll be fine. Just give me a few moments... Let me send this lost soul into the gentle embrace of death.

t_ch: 彼岸在呼唤…安心睡去吧，亡魂……
t_en: The other side is beckoning to you... Go on, lost soul, rest in peace...

t_ch: 这样…就可以了。
t_en: That... will do.

t_ch: 是眷属…当心。
t_en: The Titan's kin... Be careful.

t_ch: 斗士……
t_en: Warrior...

t_ch: 前进…不允……
t_en: Entry... forbidden...

t_ch: 失去理智了吗？可悲的造物。给它个痛快吧。
t_en: Has it lost its sanity? What a woeful creation. I shall put it out of its misery.

t_ch: 裂分…灵魂……
t_en: Split... soul...

t_ch: 身躯…不灭…！
t_en: Indestructible... body...!

t_ch: …解决掉了吗？
t_en: ...Is it dealt with?

t_ch: 不…恐怕没那么简单。
t_en: No... I doubt it'll be that simple.

t_ch: 裂分…灵魂……
t_en: Split... soul...

t_ch: 实验品……
t_en: An experiment...

t_ch: 什么意思？
t_en: What do you mean?

t_ch: 实验品？
t_en: An experiment?

t_ch: 那庸王欧利庞，他试图剥离{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的神性，并以精心打造的容器永久贮存。
t_en: King Eurypon wanted to strip {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} of their divinity and seal it within an intricate vessel for all eternity.

t_ch: 如此一来，便能令{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的神躯不死…但在开始对泰坦的改造之前，他要先用眷属进行实验。
t_en: That's how he would immortalize {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s divine body... Of course, he had to test it out on a Titankin before going on to remold the Titan.

t_ch: 你怎么这么清楚？
t_en: How are you so sure about it?

t_ch: 很简单……
t_en: The answer's very simple...

t_ch: …因为{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}四分五裂的灵魂就被贮存在这些雕像中。我听见的召唤…就来自于它们。
t_en: ...Because the fragments of {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s soul are sealed in these statues. The calls that I've been hearing... are coming from them.

t_ch: 重新拼合它的灵魂，让它的神性核心再度合而为一。如此一来，它便能找回身为泰坦的尊严，你们也能获得一个正面战胜它的机会。
t_en: As long as we reassemble their soul and unite their divine core, they will recover their dignity as a Titan. You will then have a chance to triumph over them in battle.

t_ch: 身躯…不灭……
t_en: Indestructible... body...

t_ch: 终于，我们找到一切的源头了……
t_en: We've finally found the root of everything...

t_ch: 我来拖住它吧。对于已经失去理智的眷属，死亡的气息就是能令它们沉醉的蜜霜。
t_en: I'll find a way to stall it. To Titankin that have lost all reason, death is as intoxicating as nectar is to bees.

t_ch: 两位阁下，请你们找到让{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的灵魂重归完整的办法。只有修正了这段历史…翁法罗斯才能拥有未来。
t_en: Please, you must find a way to make {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s soul whole again. It is only by fixing this point in history... that we can salvage the future of Amphoreus.

t_ch: 可以再次利用时空的力量。
t_en: We can tap into the power of time again.

t_ch: 准备好穿越了吗，角斗士？
t_en: Ready to travel through time, gladiator?

t_ch: 给我看看你的能耐吧，记忆行者。
t_en: Let's see what you can do, delver of memories.

t_ch: 用更悬锋的方式前进！<color=#dbc291ff>（跳过解谜）</color>
t_en: Progress forward in the way of Kremnos! <color=#dbc291ff>(Skip puzzle)</color>

t_ch: 给我看看你的能耐吧。
t_en: Let's see what you can do.

t_ch: 没事，我再琢磨琢磨。
t_en: No worries, let me ponder on it a bit more...

t_ch: 没啥头绪，该怎么办？<color=#dbc291ff>（跳过解谜）</color>
t_en: I have no clue, what can I do? <color=#dbc291ff>(Skip puzzle)</color>

t_ch: 没有头绪…只能先付诸行动。
t_en: There's no trace... Let's just start with these first.

t_ch: 没事，我再琢磨琢磨。
t_en: No worries, let me ponder on it a bit more...

t_ch: 留在这里，战士…不要离开你的死亡女神。此处的鲜血芬芳只为你而盛开……
t_en: Stay here, warrior... Do not leave your Goddess of Death. The enticing scent of blood here is meant for you, and only you...

t_ch: 死亡…甜蜜。
t_en: Sweet... death.

t_ch: 内在…平静。
t_en: Inner... peace.

t_ch: …不可思议。
t_en: ...Unbelievable.

t_ch: 如此昏暗破败，这就是悬锋城的未来吗？
t_en: This dark and derelict place... is this the future of Kremnos?

t_ch: 连我自己也依旧感到神奇。
t_en: I can barely believe it myself.

t_ch: 你与{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}之间的共鸣一定十分牢固。
t_en: The resonance between you and {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} must be strong.

t_ch: 这些年里一定发生了很多事。
t_en: Kremnos must have been through a lot since then...

t_ch: 历史走上了错误的轨道…需要修正。
t_en: History has taken a wrong turn... and must be set on the right course once more.

t_ch: 物换星移，但泰坦的灵魂依旧四分五裂。庸王和他的仆从大概早已化作齑粉…无人知晓曾经于此发生的一切。
t_en: Much time has passed, yet the Titan's soul remains fragmented. That covetous king and his servants would have turned to dust by now... Their scheme that once unfolded here has likewise been buried with them.

t_ch: 你我都为终结这荒谬而来。那就结伴而行，将死亡还给那位泰坦吧。
t_en: You and I are both here to bring an end to this absurdity. So, join me comrade. Let us bring death unto that Titan.

t_ch: 战斗的声音，那是……
t_en: The sounds of battle. That's...

t_ch: 在一个十分接近的时空里…
t_en: From a time dimension very close to ours...

t_ch: …我的同伴在和尼卡多利战斗。
t_en: ...My companions fighting against Nikador.

t_ch: 在这破碎的时代，仍有凡人在反抗命运——了不起。
t_en: So, there are mortals who fight against fate even in this hopelessly bleak era. I am impressed.

t_ch: 但只靠力量无法消灭不死的躯体…所以你和那女孩才会来到这个时代寻找答案。
t_en: But strength alone will not help them destroy an immortal body... That's why you and that girl went back in time seeking answers.

t_ch: 「勇气。」
t_en: "Courage."

t_ch: 此处的铸魂雕像只有四尊。假使他们的确将{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的神性分成了五份，也仍旧有一瓣灵魂不知所踪。
t_en: There are only four soul-forged statues here. If they did split {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s divinity into five parts, there is still one fragment of the soul that is missing.

t_ch: 无论如何，要先行动起来。
t_en: Let's just start with these first.

t_ch: 我同意。
t_en: Agreed.

t_ch: 再仔细思索一下呢？
t_en: Wanna brainstorm a little?

t_ch: 没有头绪…只能先付诸行动。
t_en: There's no trace... Let's just start with these first.

t_ch: 来吧，帮助我将「纷争」的神性拼凑完整。
t_en: Come, help me piece together Strife's divinity.

t_ch: 「荣耀。」
t_en: "Honor."

t_ch: 「坚韧。」
t_en: "Tenacity."

t_ch: 「牺牲。」
t_en: "Sacrifice."

t_ch: 「理智。」
t_en: "Reason."

t_ch: 我能听到…我听到了。
t_en: I can hear... I hear it.

t_ch: {RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}，它神性的一部分被封存在这里……
t_en: A part of {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s divinity is sealed within this...

t_ch: 「吾等，将神王的『勇气』封藏于剑皿之中。」
t_en: "We shall hereby seal the god-king's Courage within this sword vessel."

t_ch: 「以此为证：它从未在战场上退缩过一步。」
t_en: "A testament that they have never once retreated from a battle."

t_ch: 「即便面对那来自迷雾彼端、不可触及的黑潮，它亦孤身举剑，赫然迎战……」
t_en: "Even against the formless black tide from beyond the dense fog, they alone have raised their sword and faced the enemy head-on..."

t_ch: {RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的「勇气」——
t_en: {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s Courage...

t_ch: 挣脱束缚，回归神躯吧。
t_en: Break free from your shackles and return to your divine body.

t_ch: 铸魂雕像的长剑未能归位，此处还缺了些什么。
t_en: The Sword of the Soul-Forging Statue failed to return to its original place. Something is still missing here.

t_ch: 也许你应该尝试用扎格列斯之手将<color=#dbc291ff>雕像的底座复位。</color>
t_en: Perhaps you should try using the Hand of Zagreus to <color=#dbc291ff>restore the statue's base.</color>

t_ch: 铸魂雕像的长剑未能归位，此处还缺了些什么。仔细观察，雕像的本体并不完整。
t_en: The Sword of the Soul-Forging Statue failed to return to its original place. Something is still missing here. Upon close inspection, you notice the body of the statue is incomplete.

t_ch: 也许你应该尝试<color=#dbc291ff>用欧洛尼斯宝珠映照出它的全身。</color>
t_en: Perhaps you should try <color=#dbc291ff>using the Oronyx Orb to reflect its whole body.</color>

t_ch: 声音…开始涌现了。
t_en: The voices... are starting to pour in.

t_ch: {RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}，此处有它神性的一瓣……
t_en: Here lies another fragment of {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s divinity...

t_ch: 「吾等，将神王的『荣耀』封藏于剑皿之中。」
t_en: "We shall hereby seal the god-king's Honor within this sword vessel."

t_ch: 「以此为证：它从未将神矛刺入任何敌人的后背。」
t_en: "A testament that they have never plunged their divine lance into an enemy's back."

t_ch: 「纵使腹背受敌、内外交患，它亦从未向邪劣的诡计妥协，守护着战士的尊严……」
t_en: "Even when enemies close in from all sides, they have never conceded to evil schemes, fiercely guarding the warrior's dignity..."

t_ch: {RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的「荣耀」——
t_en: {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s Honor...

t_ch: 挣脱束缚，回归神躯吧。
t_en: Break free from your shackles and return to your divine body.

t_ch: 我在聆听……
t_en: I am listening...

t_ch: 来吧…同我诉说吧。
t_en: Go on... Tell me your tale.

t_ch: 「吾等，将神王的『坚韧』封藏于剑皿之中。」
t_en: "We shall hereby seal the god-king's Tenacity within this sword vessel."

t_ch: 「以此为证：它在以不屈的意志与那不明源头的灾厄搏斗。」
t_en: "A testament that their will is unyielding in the fight against the calamity of unknown origin."

t_ch: 「即便那黑潮如此强大、足以腐蚀神明的意志，它亦站立至今，对抗那浊世的阴霾……」
t_en: "No matter how powerful the black tide may be, enough to corrupt the wills of other gods, they stand tall and upright in defiance of the turbulent fog, even till today..."

t_ch: {RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的「坚韧」——
t_en: {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s Tenacity...

t_ch: 挣脱束缚，回归神躯吧。
t_en: Break free from your shackles and return to your divine body.

t_ch: 这尊雕像中亦存有神性。
t_en: Divinity exists within this statue.

t_ch: 为我讲述吧，此处发生的一切……
t_en: Tell me everything that happened here...

t_ch: 「吾等，将神王的『牺牲』封藏于剑皿之中。」
t_en: "We shall hereby seal the god-king's Sacrifice within this sword vessel."

t_ch: 「以此为证：它陷入沉眠前最后留下的话语，是为世界抵御黑暗浪潮的誓言。」
t_en: "A testament that their final words before sinking into dormancy were a vow to defend the world against the black tide."

t_ch: 「它将以自身为城墙，阻挡无尽蔓延的疯狂。它深谙：若末世降临，世间将无物可供征伐……」
t_en: "They use their own body as our city walls, keeping out and protecting us from the pervasive spread of madness. They are acutely aware that if the end times were to arrive, there would be nothing left in this world to conquer..."

t_ch: {RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的「牺牲」——
t_en: {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s Sacrifice...

t_ch: 挣脱束缚，回归神躯吧。
t_en: Break free from your shackles and return to your divine body.

t_ch: 这样就完成了吗？
t_en: Is... that it?

t_ch: 嗯…只剩下那最后缺失的一瓣神性。
t_en: Hm... We're now left with the final missing fragment of divinity.

t_ch: 我知道该去哪里寻找了。
t_en: I believe I know where it is.

t_ch: 该去哪找缺失的那份神性？
t_en: Where could the missing fragment of divinity be?

t_ch: 我想错了，那最后的一瓣神性并没有遗失……
t_en: I was wrong all this while. The final fragment of divinity was never lost...

t_ch: 我知道该去哪里寻找了。
t_en: I believe I know where it is.

t_ch: 快要成功了吗，格奈乌斯阁下？
t_en: Lord Gnaeus, are we almost there?

t_ch: 嗯…只剩下这最后一步了。
t_en: Yes... There is just one last thing to do.

t_ch: 不知何时，从遥远的地平线外诞生了黑潮——它缓慢地逼近翁法罗斯的边界，而{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}是第一位与之接触的泰坦。
t_en: No one knows when the black tide first appeared beyond the distant horizon, but when it slowly encroached upon Amphoreus' borders, {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} was the first Titan to venture forth.

t_ch: 在和黑潮的抗争中，它的神志开始消逝…鼎盛时的泰坦只一剑便能令群岛灰飞烟灭，却无法斩除腐蚀的根源。
t_en: During the battle against the black tide, their sanity began to slip away... In their prime, the Titan could obliterate an entire archipelago with a single slash, yet they could not sever the root of this corruption.

t_ch: 它凭着意志与黑潮缠斗，但终究落败。在神性被彻底污染前，它将自己的一部分剥离了出来……
t_en: They battled the black tide by sheer will alone, but ultimately succumbed to it. Before their divinity could be completely corrupted, they removed a part of it...

t_ch: 难道……
t_en: Could it be...

t_ch: 它剥离的那部分神性——它最想完整保存的部分——即为「理智」。
t_en: The fragment of divinity that they stripped away — the fragment they wanted to preserve the most — was Reason.

t_ch: 泰坦相信，它的「理智」终有一日会响应召唤，回到神明的躯体身边…完成它应尽的使命。
t_en: The Titan believed that their Reason would someday respond to their calling, to return to their body... and fulfill their sacred mission.

t_ch: 这些都是…曾经的你？
t_en: Are all these... versions of you from the past?

t_ch: 你是…尼卡多利的一部分？
t_en: You're... a part of Nikador?

t_ch: 这些，全部都是……
t_en: All of these... They're—

t_ch: 他们代表了无数次失败的尝试。在你们的帮助下，我终于能给这一切画上句号。
t_en: They represent countless failed endeavors. With your help, I can finally put an end to everything.

t_ch: 格奈乌斯阁下…你打算怎么做？
t_en: Lord Gnaeus... What do you intend to do?

t_ch: 勇气、荣耀、坚韧、牺牲，它们皆是我的分身…从灵魂碎片的低语里，我已经得到定论——
t_en: Courage, Honor, Tenacity, and Sacrifice... they're all versions of me. Hearing the murmurs of these soul fragments has led me to a conclusion.

t_ch: {RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>纷争之泰坦</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>尼卡多利</color>{RUBY_E#}<color=#dbc291ff>的灵魂已经腐烂，再无被救赎的可能。</color>
t_en: {RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>Strife Titan</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>Nikador's</color>{RUBY_E#}<color=#dbc291ff> soul is corrupted beyond the point of salvation.</color>

t_ch: 有什么事是我们能做的？
t_en: What can we do then?

t_ch: 还有一个选择。
t_en: There is only one option.

t_ch: 我们该怎么阻止它？
t_en: How do we stop them then?

t_ch: 只有一条道路。
t_en: There is only one way to do so.

t_ch: 束缚着神性的封印已经解除。只要在此完成铸魂，{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}就能重归完整。
t_en: The seal that binds their divinity is already broken. As long as we complete the soul-forging here, {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} will be whole once more.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>你们将与一位几近鼎盛的泰坦战斗；同时，弑神的荣光也将在你们面前绽放。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>You will go into battle with a Titan nearly at the zenith of their powers. And when that happens, the glory of slaying a god will also be presented before you.</color>

t_ch: …那你呢，格奈乌斯阁下？
t_en: ...What about you, Lord Gnaeus?

t_ch: 我将回归本源，成为{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}神性的一个片段。
t_en: I will return to where I came from and become a part of {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s divinity once more.

t_ch: 腐蚀大概会将我吞没吧？但为了终结疯狂，这一步无可避免。
t_en: In all likelihood, I will also be consumed by corruption. An inevitable course of action if we hope to end this madness.

t_ch: 你愿意为一个…自己无法见证的未来做出牺牲？
t_en: You are willing to... sacrifice yourself for a future you won't get to witness?

t_ch: 那是我的本源，我的使命。我并非凡人，也不惧怕死亡——即便如此，你也打算为我哀哭吗？
t_en: This is my purpose, my origin. I am no mortal and I do not fear death... Even so, will you still weep for me?

t_ch: 这世上的离别皆是哀伤，阁下。
t_en: All farewells in this world are sorrowful, Lord Gnaeus.

t_ch: 我们相识不久，但我已从你身上学到很多。那么，让我在临走前也教你一课吧——
t_en: While we haven't known each other for long, I have learned much from you. In return, I'll teach you a lesson of mine before I go...

t_ch: 不要嫌恶你的天赋，不要憎恨死亡。<color=#dbc291ff>征途之所以伟大，史诗之所以壮阔，皆因万物终有逝去之时。</color>
t_en: Do not detest your talent and do not abhor death. <color=#dbc291ff>Journeys and epics are only glorious and magnificent because all things eventually fade to dust.</color>

t_ch: …身为「纷争」的化身，却在向我讲述世界的壮美吗？真是讽刺……
t_en: ...The embodiment of Strife telling me about the majesty of the world...? What an irony...

t_ch: 只有被置于纷争之下，文明方能成长。人生来便憎恶苦难，但唯有苦难能教人屹立……
t_en: Civilizations only grow under strife. Humans instinctively loathe suffering, yet suffering is the only thing that teaches them to stand unyielding and tall...

t_ch: 容不得再拖延了。
t_en: We can't put this off any longer.

t_ch: 我会如你所愿。
t_en: I will do as you wish.

t_ch: 若必须与你一战…那便战吧。
t_en: If this is meant to be... then I will fight you.

t_ch: {F#她}{M#他}比你更懂得战斗的意义，也许能成为你的启迪。
t_en: {F#She}{M#He} knows what it truly means to go to battle. Perhaps {F#she}{M#he} can be your inspiration.

t_ch: 你若死在我的矛下，便无需再试着理解这些话语；你若能将我埋葬…答应我，你们会将火种当作柴薪，升起烈焰，继续与黑潮抗争。
t_en: If you die by my lance, then there's no need to reflect on what I said. But if you should send me to my grave... promise me that you will use my Coreflame to fuel a roaring blaze and continue the fight against the black tide.

t_ch: 我…代表全体黄金裔，答应你的请求。
t_en: On behalf of all the Chrysos Heirs, I... promise you.

t_ch: 我是天谴之矛，{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}——乱世的使者，纷争的化身！
t_en: I am {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}, the Lance of Fury, the messenger of turmoil, and the embodiment of Strife!

t_ch: 记住——<color=#dbc291ff>我是这世间必要的伤痕！</color>
t_en: Remember this: <color=#dbc291ff>I am the scar that this world needs!</color>

t_ch: 这里。这里！
t_en: Here. Here!

t_ch: 记忆，诗歌…收集！
t_en: Memories, ballads... Collect!

t_ch: 这里。这里！
t_en: Here. Here!

t_ch: 记忆，工匠…收集！
t_en: Memory, craftsman... Collect!

t_ch: {NICKNAME}阁下，你还好吗？
t_en: {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}, are you feeling alright?

t_ch: 你又进入了…和{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}那时一样的状态。
t_en: You were in the same state as when you were with {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}.

t_ch: 我们…该怎么回到往世？
t_en: ...How can we go back to the past?

t_ch: 过来，跟上！
t_en: Come, follow!

t_ch: 记忆…味道，浓烈！
t_en: Memory... Scent, strong!

t_ch: 那声战吼，是万敌阁下？
t_en: That battle cry... Is that Lord Mydei?

t_ch: {RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}…他们还在战斗。
t_en: {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}... They're still locked in battle.

t_ch: （若虫已经定位到扰动的源头了…去找衣匠收集情报吧。）
t_en: (The nymphs have located the source of the disruption... I should check with the "Garmentmaker" for intel.)

t_ch: 这是什么异常现象…
t_en: What is this strange phenomenon...?

t_ch: 该不该报告给队长呢？
t_en: Should I report it to the captain?

t_ch: （不能留下痕迹，避免他人起疑。）
t_en: (I need to ensure I leave no trace behind, so that no one suspects anything.)

t_ch: （去找下一只若虫吧。）
t_en: (Time to move on to the next nymph.)

t_ch: （若虫标记出的威胁还剩一处。）
t_en: (There's one more threat marked by the nymphs.)

t_ch: （天父{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}，指引我…一切都还在掌控之中。）
t_en: ({RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}, sky father, I seek your guidance... May your hand keep all things in order.)

t_ch: 毫无新意的把戏…你真以为能逃出我的罗网吗？
t_en: How predictable... Did you truly think you could outrun me?

t_ch: 桀桀桀！不试试又怎么知道？
t_en: Teehee! It was worth a try, wasn't it?

t_ch: （若虫找到的污秽都已经清理完了。）
t_en: (All the filth marked by the nymphs has been cleansed.)

t_ch: （回去见吾师吧。）
t_en: (I should go find teacher.)

t_ch: …缇宁？看来她已经在为保卫奥赫玛做准备了。
t_en: ...Trinnon? It seems she has begun to make arrangements for defending Okhema.

t_ch: 那道光芒下…有浓烈的死亡气味。
t_en: Under all this resplendence... is the distinct stench of death.

t_ch: 再壮丽的死亡都不可能甜美……
t_en: But even the most magnificent of deaths can never be sweet...

t_ch: 格奈乌斯阁下，请问你为何而战？
t_en: Lord Gnaeus, may I ask what is it you are fighting for?

t_ch: 战斗本身无需理由。我只想粉碎愚蠢。
t_en: Fighting needs no reason. I seek only to crush foolishness.

t_ch: 看，火盆被点燃了。
t_en: Look, we lit the brazier.

t_ch: 这些…装置，你们似乎相当熟悉。
t_en: You seem quite familiar with these... devices.

t_ch: 咦？它们在翁法罗斯应该随处可见才对。
t_en: Huh? They're all over Amphoreus.

t_ch: {RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}……
t_en: {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}...

t_ch: 怎么了吗，阁下？
t_en: What's wrong, Lord Gnaeus?

t_ch: 软弱让它沦为了人的奴仆。
t_en: Weak. Reduced to a servant of humans.

t_ch: 果然，大门打开了。
t_en: The gate has opened, as expected.

t_ch: 消磨斗士的耐心，无聊至极。
t_en: A meaningless challenge to erode the patience of warriors.

t_ch: 碎裂吧，弱者。
t_en: Crumble, weakling.

t_ch: 泰坦的造物？何时变得如此软弱……
t_en: The Titan's creations? When did they become so weak...?

t_ch: 安睡吧……
t_en: Rest in peace...

t_ch: 无梦的睡眠，只是一片死寂。
t_en: A dreamless sleep is nothing but deathly silence.

t_ch: {RUBY_B#诡计之泰坦}扎格列斯{RUBY_E#}，卑劣的化身。
t_en: {RUBY_B#Trickery Titan}Zagreus{RUBY_E#}, the embodiment of all things despicable.

t_ch: 它的遗产竟沦为了人的玩物……
t_en: Their legacy reduced to mere playthings for humans...

t_ch: 破坏力比想象中更大……
t_en: This is a lot more destructive than I expected...

t_ch: 这巨手真的曾被用来偷盗吗？
t_en: Was this giant hand really used for thievery in the past?

t_ch: …灰飞烟灭。
t_en: ...Crumble to dust.

t_ch: 这帮家伙，可比看上去强多了……
t_en: Hmph, these goons are much tougher than they seem...

t_ch: 运气真好，运气真好……
t_en: Wahaha, it's my lucky day...

t_ch: 好武器！真是把好武器……
t_en: What a fine weapon! It's a real beauty...

t_ch: 稍微清洁一下就看不出是二手的了，哈……
t_en: With a bit of sprucing up, no one will guess it's second-hand, heh...

t_ch: 在下个转角停下。
t_en: Stop at the next turn.

t_ch: 若是刺客…就在那里解决他。
t_en: If there's an assassin... we'll take care of him right there.

t_ch: 右边的高台上没有铁球……
t_en: The platform on the right is missing an iron ball...

t_ch: 或许要在施展「奇迹」之后才会出现？
t_en: Do we have to summon a miracle for it to appear?

t_ch: 道路断裂了，怎么解决？
t_en: The bridge ahead is broken. How do we get across?

t_ch: 用「欧洛尼斯宝珠」照射看看吧。
t_en: Let's try illuminating it with the Oronyx Orb.

t_ch: 还差一个火盆。
t_en: One more to go.

t_ch: 这样…应该就可以了吧？
t_en: That... should have done it, right?

t_ch: 去典籍那里回收「奇迹」吧，{NICKNAME}阁下。
t_en: Let's recover the miracle from the tome, {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 不知有多少人能走到这一步……
t_en: Are there others who made it this far...?

t_ch: 不要低估踏入此地的战士，他们绝不缺乏技巧和英勇。
t_en: Never underestimate those who step into this arena. They are skilled and courageous beyond measure.

t_ch: 勇者…勇者。上前来，上前来啊……
t_en: Brave one... Step forth...

t_ch: 你身上…有那罕见的光环……
t_en: I sense... a rare aura around you...

t_ch: 你或许…是悬锋城的救赎啊……
t_en: You could well be... Castrum Kremnos' salvation...

t_ch: 那座雕像…是在呼唤我们吗？
t_en: Is that statue... beckoning to us?

t_ch: 格奈乌斯阁下，你听到的召唤……
t_en: Lord Gnaeus, the calling you're heeding...

t_ch: 它来自这城池的深处。很接近了…现在，它几乎就在我耳边低语。
t_en: Comes from the depths of this city. We're close... so close, in fact, that I can hear the whispers in my ears.

t_ch: 你能唤醒死者？
t_en: You can rouse the dead?

t_ch: 不…我能唤来的，只有还未彻底死去的灵魂。
t_en: No... I can only summon souls that haven't fully passed on.

t_ch: 咳…咳咳……
t_en: *cough* *cough*

t_ch: 你怎么了，女孩？
t_en: What's wrong, girl?

t_ch: 引渡灵魂需要耗费精力…但我没事，阁下。
t_en: Guiding souls takes a lot of energy... but I'm fine, Lord Gnaeus.

t_ch: 咳…咳咳……
t_en: *cough* *cough*

t_ch: 下一个…坚持到…下一个。
t_en: The next one... I need to last till... the next one.

t_ch: 咳！咳、咳……
t_en: *cough* *cough* *cough*

t_ch: …不必勉强。
t_en: ...Don't push yourself.

t_ch: 只差最后一步了…我能感应到……
t_en: We're almost at the end... I can sense it...

t_ch: 抱歉，我刚才…有些失态。
t_en: I am sorry... that you had to witness my earlier outburst.

t_ch: 我理解你的苦楚，女孩。但现在，你必须先把它搁在一边。
t_en: I understand your pain, child. But you need to set it aside for now.

t_ch: 浇铸和切割灵魂之地…我们很接近了。
t_en: We are nearing the place where they cast and cut the souls.

t_ch: 祭典期间，恐怕无人曾活着踏足此地。切勿松懈。
t_en: It is likely no one survived this far in the festival. Stay alert.

t_ch: 已触发<color=#dbc291ff>压力机关</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>Pressure mechanism</color> triggered

t_ch: 时间紧迫，先看看能不能直接前进吧。
t_en: Time is running out. Check if you can directly move straight ahead.

t_ch: 终于，都结束了。
t_en: It's finally over.

t_ch: {RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的火种……
t_en: {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s Coreflame...

t_ch: 岁月飞逝，距离上一位泰坦殒落已经过去了很久……
t_en: Time passes quickly. It's been a long time since the last Titan fell...

t_ch: {RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}「天谴之矛」{RUBY_E#}已然不再，黄金裔距离神谕中的创世更近了一步。
t_en: Now that the {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Lance of Fury{RUBY_E#} is no more, we Chrysos Heirs are one step closer to the genesis as foretold in the prophecy.

t_ch: 这里安静得令人窒息…失去了坐镇的泰坦，这城池竟变得如此陌生。
t_en: The silence here is stifling... This city feels so unfamiliar now that its Titan is gone.

t_ch: 你和它已经连着交手几千个回合了…我猜只是你的耳朵还没习惯这清净吧？
t_en: You've exchanged thousands of blows with them... Your ears are probably just not used to this peace and quiet.

t_ch: …哼。接下来要怎么做？
t_en: ...Hmph. What's next?

t_ch: 我和那位泰坦约定好了…黄金裔会带走它的火种，以它作为柴薪，照亮未来的路。
t_en: I have an agreement with the Titan... The Chrysos Heirs will take away their Coreflame and use it to start a bright blaze that'll illuminate our path onward.

t_ch: 你们和{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}…交流过了？
t_en: You... spoke with {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}?

t_ch: 它在为世界抵御某种东西。
t_en: They were protecting the world from something.

t_ch: 它说了什么？我需要知道……
t_en: What did they say? Please, I need to know...

t_ch: 它的疯狂源于外因。
t_en: There was something out there that sent them into madness.

t_ch: 外因？我需要知道……
t_en: Something out there? Please, I need to know what it is...

t_ch: 不必心急，万敌阁下。待回到奥赫玛后，由我来为你转述吧。
t_en: Not now, Lord Mydei. I'll tell you everything once we return to Okhema.

t_ch: 阿格莱雅说过…必须有人触碰并吸收「火种」，暂时成为它的载体。
t_en: Aglaea mentioned that... someone must touch the Coreflame and absorb it to become its temporary receptacle.

t_ch: 万敌，你……
t_en: Mydei, do you...

t_ch: …这殊荣就交给你吧。这是你一直憧憬的画面，不是么？
t_en: ...This honor is yours. Isn't it something you've been longing for?

t_ch: 但你比我更有资格…你的身上又添了不少新伤。
t_en: But you're more deserving of it... You sustained all these new wounds from fighting them.

t_ch: 你若知道鏖战是多么疲倦……
t_en: If you have any idea how exhausting it is to fight a protracted battle...

t_ch: …就更应该明白，我现在最不想做的就是多费口舌。
t_en: ...Then you should know that pointless arguments are the last thing I want to get into now.

t_ch: …好歹跟我辩上几句吧？这么轻描淡写地带过，容易让人以为不是什么命运攸关的大事啊。
t_en: Meh, a little back and forth wouldn't hurt much. Coming to a decision so easily makes it seem like this is not at all a life-changing undertaking, you know.

t_ch: 火种——跟我走吧。创世涡心在等待你的回归。
t_en: Come with me then, Coreflame. The Vortex of Genesis is awaiting your return.

t_ch: 还好吗，白厄？
t_en: Are you alright, Phainon?

t_ch: …感觉什么变化都没有。
t_en: ...I don't think I felt anything at all.

t_ch: 应该说…反而比我想象中轻松多了？我本以为承载火种需要付出更多…代价。
t_en: Or rather... it felt a lot easier than I expected? I had assumed that bearing the Coreflame would take... a lot more out of me.

t_ch: 走吧，回奥赫玛去。把胜利的消息带给两位半神。
t_en: In any case, let's return to Okhema and share news of our victory with the two demigods.

t_ch: 离开，伙伴？回去，一起？
t_en: Leave, friend? Return, together?

t_ch: 不回去吗，遐蝶？
t_en: Aren't you coming with us, Castorice?

t_ch: 还有什么事要做吗？
t_en: Did we forget something?

t_ch: 我会记住格奈乌斯的。
t_en: I will always remember Gnaeus.

t_ch: 他虽然只是{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的一枚碎片…但也是一位英雄。
t_en: Although he was but a part of {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}... he was nevertheless a hero in his own right.

t_ch: 请先回去吧，{NICKNAME}阁下，我稍后就会跟上。我想再和格奈乌斯阁下沟通一次…最后一次。
t_en: Go with the rest, {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}. I will catch up with you later. I would like to talk to Lord Gnaeus again... one last time.

t_ch: 格奈乌斯阁下……
t_en: Lord Gnaeus...

t_ch: …{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}大人，你还听得见吗？
t_en: ...Lord {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}, can you hear me?

t_ch: 我知道你现在只想安然睡去。但唯有你能解答我心头的疑惑…请原谅我的叨扰。
t_en: I know that your only wish right now is to rest in peace. But you are the only one with answers to my deepest doubts... So, forgive me for disturbing you.

t_ch: 请告诉我…你是否知道{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}身在何方？
t_en: Please, tell me... do you know where {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#} is?

t_ch: 我必须找到它。<color=#dbc291ff>我自出生起就被剥夺的那一半</color>…必须从它手中拿回。
t_en: I must find them. <color=#dbc291ff>The half of me that I've been deprived of since birth</color>... I must take it back from them.

t_ch: （破碎的泰坦之声）
t_en: (Titan's fragmented voice)

t_ch: 这样啊…就连「纷争」泰坦也从未直面「死亡」本尊。
t_en: I see... So even the Strife Titan has never seen Death in the flesh.

t_ch: 我的远行还要继续，哪怕要走遍翁法罗斯的每个角落……
t_en: I will continue this arduous journey, even if I must travel to every corner of Amphoreus...

t_ch: （破碎的泰坦之声）
t_en: (Titan's fragmented voice)

t_ch: 我明白…黄金裔一定会尊重约定，延续你未竟之事。
t_en: I understand... The Chrysos Heirs will fulfill the promise we made and see your unfinished work to its end.

t_ch: 你将纷争带给此世，本不应拥有如此平静的结局…但没有关系。这里只有你我，其他人不必看见你临终的模样。
t_en: Such a peaceful end is not befitting of you, the bringer of Strife into this world... But it's a good thing it's just me here. No one else can see what you look like in the final moments of your life.

t_ch: 在诗人的笔下，你仍会是疯狂和堕落的化身，燃尽了荣光的战神。但此时此刻…我愿意送你前往开满花朵的温柔乡。
t_en: Poets will still describe you as an embodiment of madness and corruption, the god of war who incinerated all of their glory. Yet, at this moment... I am willing to send you into the gentle embrace of death, to a sweet land full of blossoming flowers.

t_ch: 永别了，泰坦。
t_en: Farewell, Titan.

t_ch: 一段时间后……
t_en: Some time later...

t_ch: 阿雅，他们回来了！
t_en: Agy, they're back!

t_ch: 我们完成使命了，缇宝老师——没有缺肢断腿，只是掌心多出了一颗滚烫的火种。
t_en: We completed the mission, Tribbie! No broken limbs or severe injuries, just a fiery Coreflame in the palm of my hand.

t_ch: 我能感应到火种的温度…做得好，白厄。
t_en: I can feel the Coreflame's warmth... Well done, Phainon.

t_ch: 翁法罗斯已经许久未见一位新的半神诞生了。若你能填补{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}留下的空缺，对于圣城的公民将会是极大的鼓舞。
t_en: It has been far too long since Amphoreus last saw the birth of a demigod. Having you take {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s place will surely invigorate the spirits of those in the holy city.

t_ch: 我…必须向你们坦白，我认为万敌是更合适的人选。他曾是悬锋城的王储，生命中的大部分时间都在随{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}一同征战。
t_en: I... want to be honest about this: I believe Mydei is the better candidate. He was once the crown prince of Kremnos after all, and much of his lifetime was spent fighting alongside {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}.

t_ch: 他比我更称得上「纷争」这个词的重量。
t_en: He is more worthy of the title of "Strife" than I am.

t_ch: 天真的孩子，你考虑得如此之多，却唯独忘记了一件事——
t_en: You have thought much about this, sweet child, but there is one thing you overlooked.

t_ch: 你所说种种，也许正是迈德漠斯不愿接过这颗火种的理由。
t_en: The qualities you've mentioned are very likely the reasons Mydeimos refused this Coreflame.

t_ch: 我不怀疑他的力量和资质…成神的景象，他也一定在脑海中预演过千遍。但他之所以推托，正是不想再带领族人走上相同的道路。
t_en: I do not doubt his strength and talents... In fact, he must have imagined himself becoming a god a thousand times over. But he turned it down because he does not want to lead his people down the same path again.

t_ch: 所以…你做好觉悟了吗，哀丽秘榭的白厄？
t_en: So I will ask you once more... Have you made up your mind, Phainon of Aedes Elysiae?

t_ch: 我准备好了。两位，我将和你们一同承担神性之重…我愿意做出必要的牺牲。
t_en: I am ready for this. I will shoulder the burden of divinity alongside the both of you... I am willing to make the necessary sacrifices.

t_ch: 很好。
t_en: Very good.

t_ch: 终于等到这一天了，小白。这是你一直以来的愿望，对吧？
t_en: This day has finally come, Snowy. You've been wanting this all along, right?

t_ch: 回到当年，假如神谕没有找到我…我肯定还在漫无目的地流浪。此时此刻，我存在的意义就是为黄金裔的使命奉献一切。
t_en: If the prophecy hadn't found me back then... I would still be roaming the world aimlessly. Right now though, I live for the sole purpose of dedicating myself to the mission of the Chrysos Heirs.

t_ch: 我从未怀疑过你的决心。
t_en: I never once doubted your resolve.

t_ch: 明日同一时分，黄金裔将在创世涡心集合，归还天谴之矛，{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的火种。
t_en: This time tomorrow, the Chrysos Heirs will gather at the Vortex of Genesis to surrender the Coreflame that once belonged to {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}, the Lance of Fury.

t_ch: 记住，这不是祭司们亘古不变的仪式。无人知晓凡人需要付出多大的代价，才能接下「纷争」的神权，你的前路仍充满变数。
t_en: Remember, this is unlike the unchanging rites our priests perform. No one knows the true cost a mortal must pay to accept Strife's divine authority. Your road ahead is still full of uncertainty.

t_ch: 用剩下的时间好好休养吧，白厄。
t_en: Use this time to properly rest, Phainon.

t_ch: 我明白了。那么，明天见。
t_en: I understand. Until tomorrow, then.

t_ch: 还真是风平浪静，仿佛什么都没发生过。
t_en: It's so peaceful, as if nothing even happened.

t_ch: 毕竟有两位半神的保护。
t_en: We're protected by two demigods, after all.

t_ch: 有人在替他们负重前行…
t_en: There are others carrying the burden for them.

t_ch: 能在如此乱世中静心享乐，翁法罗斯人的精神属实脱俗。
t_en: The people of Amphoreus must have extraordinary spirits to be able to enjoy their lives even in such troubled times.

t_ch: …都要归功于阿格莱雅和缇宝老师。在她们的保护下，公民们得以尽享安宁。
t_en: ...They have Aglaea and Tribbie to thank for that. It is because of their protection that the citizens are able to enjoy peace.

t_ch: 万敌去哪了？
t_en: Where did Mydei go?

t_ch: 他很疲惫，先一步回去休息了。
t_en: He was exhausted, so he already went back to rest.

t_ch: 如果没有二位的帮助，这场战役胜负难料。感谢的话你们也快听腻了吧？但果然还是得——
t_en: Our victory might not have been possible without your help. I'm sure you've heard enough words of gratitude, but it's only right that I—

t_ch: …啊，但对你说谢谢，应该还是第一次？多谢帮助，迷迷…小姐？
t_en: ...Right, it would be the first time I thanked you. So, thank you for your help, uh... Miss Mem?

t_ch: 接下来有什么安排？
t_en: What's next for us?

t_ch: 明天这个时候，阿格莱雅会召集我们前往创世涡心，进行归还火种的仪式。
t_en: Aglaea will gather us at the Vortex of Genesis this time tomorrow, where we'll perform a ritual to surrender the Coreflame.

t_ch: 虽然她的原话里只提到了「黄金裔」…但如果是我邀请你们到场，她一定不会拒绝。
t_en: She only mentioned the Chrysos Heirs, but if I invite you two... I'm sure she'll welcome your presence.

t_ch: 这场仪式——有什么要注意的吗？
t_en: Is there anything we should know about this ritual?

t_ch: 照阿格莱雅的说法，没人能预测会发生什么。因为每位泰坦的神权独一无二。所以，我更希望两位能到场，为我带去些信心。
t_en: From what Aglaea said, no one can predict what's going to happen, because each Titan's divine authority is unique. That's why I hope both of you can be there tomorrow. It'll bolster my confidence.

t_ch: 一定来支持你，老白。
t_en: Aww, Phainon buddy, we've got your back.

t_ch: 哈哈哈，一言为定。
t_en: Hahaha, that's settled then.

t_ch: 叫我们来可是要出场费的！
t_en: Oh, we charge a fee for appearances!

t_ch: 那这笔账就先记在阿格莱雅头上吧？她的外号是「金织」——听着就很阔气，对吧？
t_en: Uh, that can be on Aglaea's tab. She's also known as the Goldweaver. Doesn't that name alone sound wealthy?

t_ch: 没睡过头就来。
t_en: Sure, as long as we don't oversleep.

t_ch: 哈哈哈，那我一定会派人把你摇醒的。
t_en: Hahaha, I'll be sure to send someone to wake you up then.

t_ch: 仪式开始前的这段时间尽可自由支配，好好休息吧…我也要花些时间整理思绪。回头见了，朋友们。
t_en: The night's all yours, but get some rest before tomorrow's ritual. I should also take this time to sort out my thoughts... I'll see you soon, my friends.

t_ch: 你和丹恒目送白厄离开了浴场……
t_en: You and Dan Heng watch Phainon leave the bath...

t_ch: 你能感觉到吗，{NICKNAME}？他好像心事重重。
t_en: Did you pick up on that, {NICKNAME}? He seems troubled.

t_ch: 我感觉到了。
t_en: Yeah, I did.

t_ch: 我没感觉到。
t_en: Pick up on what?

t_ch: 学习下观察他人的肢体动作和微表情吧，很有用。
t_en: You should start observing people's body language and their microexpressions. You can learn a lot from them.

t_ch: 你怎么感觉到的？
t_en: How can you tell?

t_ch: 肢体动作，还有…微表情。
t_en: From his body language and... microexpressions.

t_ch: 也难怪，他要经历的事太过特殊。虽然泰坦只是翁法罗斯本地的神明，但要从「人」晋升为另一种存在…其中过程难以想象。
t_en: I guess it's understandable, seeing how he's about to experience something extraordinary. The Titans may only be local gods of Amphoreus, but a mortal ascending to something else altogether... sounds like a lot to take in.

t_ch: 我们也有很多要考虑的事。
t_en: We have a lot to think about too.

t_ch: 也该想想我们自己了。
t_en: About time we consider ourselves, too.

t_ch: …的确，之前发生的一系列事件过于紧凑，甚至没时间供我们思考眼下的困局。
t_en: ...You're right. So much happened in so short a time that we haven't had the time to consider our own predicament.

t_ch: 车厢报废，联络不上列车组，再加上对天外之界的禁令……
t_en: Our car's scrap, we've lost contact with the Crew, and everything beyond the sky is taboo here...

t_ch: 我的连续登录要断了。
t_en: I'm gonna lose my login streak.

t_ch: 嗯，甚至没法给三月发消息，让她替你清下每日任务。
t_en: It's a pity we can't send March a message, so she can help you finish your dailies.

t_ch: 应该提前准备点能玩的。
t_en: Should've brought games we could play offline...

t_ch: …我倒是有些古早小游戏，但你估计不感兴趣。
t_en: ...I do have some old-timey games with me, but I doubt you'd be interested.

t_ch: 等白厄的晋升仪式结束，我们也该仔细盘算下这些麻烦了。
t_en: Once Phainon's ascension ritual is over, we should start working out these problems of ours.

t_ch: 至于现在，先回浴宫休息整顿吧。
t_en: For now though, let's just head back to the bath chamber to rest and gather ourselves.

t_ch: 倦意包裹了你…此时此刻，无论哪位翁法罗斯的神明都无法让你的目光从这张躺椅上移开。
t_en: Exhaustion envelops you... At this moment, no god of Amphoreus could pull your gaze away from this lounge chair.

t_ch: 哎呀…困了吗？人家看你，眼皮都快睁不开啦。
t_en: Aww, are you sleepy? I can see your eyelids growing heavy~

t_ch: 困了就睡吧，呼呼、呼呼…不过，这城里是没有黑夜吗？有点睡不着呀……
t_en: Go to sleep then, if you're tired. Snoozy snooze... But isn't it always daytime in this city? How do you fall asleep like this...?

t_ch: 等等…似乎有什么地方不对……
t_en: Wait... Something seems off...

t_ch: …你察觉到了吗？
t_en: ...Did you notice?

t_ch: 哎——被这么盯着，人家也是会害羞的哦？
t_en: Eep! I'll get embarrassed if you keep staring at me like that.

t_ch: 是我身上的毛打结了吗？还是耳朵…耳朵挺好的呀？你看，它们还会一抖一抖的。
t_en: Are there... knots in my fur? Is it my ears? No, they seem fine. Look, I can even flap them!

t_ch: …你不口吃了？！
t_en: ...You can say more than single words now!?

t_ch: 原来你说话能连成整句啊！
t_en: Wow, so you can speak in full sentences!

t_ch: …啊，对哦！人家竟然能蹦出完整的句子了！
t_en: ...Hmm? You're right! I am speaking in full sentences now!

t_ch: 喂喂喂——喂喂喂——能流畅说话的感觉，好棒啊！不过…原来我的说话风格这么成熟吗？第一人称代词竟然是…「人家」？
t_en: Wowie! It feels amazing being able to speak fluently! But... why do I speak in such a proper, un-cutesy manner now? I mean, referring to myself in standard first person and all.

t_ch: 可能是为了增加个性。
t_en: Maybe it gives you more personality.

t_ch: 个性…？你总是会说些人家听不懂的话，很调皮呢！
t_en: Personality...? Hmph, you're always saying things I don't understand!

t_ch: 你怎么没配音啊？
t_en: Why aren't your words enunciated?

t_ch: 就是就是，太不公平了！对不对？
t_en: Right!? You noticed too? Hmph, no fair!

t_ch: 恶心心！
t_en: Ew, phooey!
